    Intro Static Plots Interactive Plots Customization FAQs Install Poppins font

    Generic echart4r workhorse function Helper function to echart_bar_chart and echart_line_chart

    generic_echart.Rd

    Generic echart4r workhorse function Helper function to echart_bar_chart and echart_line_chart

    Usage

    generic_echart(
  df,
  category_var,
  fill = NULL,
  color = NULL,
  est = "percent",
  title = NULL,
  subtitle = NULL,
  legend = TRUE,
  egrid_bottom = "15%",
  egrid_left = "20%",
  legend_str_wrap = NULL,
  x_label_str_wrap = NULL,
  x_label_rotate = 0
)

    Arguments

    df

    A data frame in long form for plotting

    category_var

    The name of the category variable

    fill

    The name of the variable you want the fill color of the bars or lines to be based on

    color

    A vector of colors or color palette

    est

    Select "number", "percent", or "currency" - defaults to "percent"

    title

    Chart title

    subtitle

    Chart subtitle

    legend

    TRUE or FALSE to display legend - defaults to TRUE

    egrid_bottom

    Bottom axis padding - defaults to "15%"

    egrid_left

    Left axis padding - defaults to "20%"

    legend_str_wrap

    Positive integer giving target line width to legend labels (in number of characters) - defaults to NULL

    x_label_str_wrap

    Positive integer giving target line width to x-axis labels (in number of characters) - defaults to NULL

    x_label_rotate

    Positive integer giving x-axis label rotation - defaults to 0

    Value

    Does not return a chart, called within echart_bar_chart and echart_line_chart

    On this page
